holiFest: 1 गते New Year 2082 starts, Lalitpur Rato Machhendranath Snan (Bungadhya: nhynwa:)
2 गते Siruwa Pawani Parba (Siruwa Parba Manaune Jhapa, Morang
3 गते Bhaktapur Bramhayani Yatra, Swami Sashidhar Jayanti
7 गते Rabi Saptami, Aastami Brat
8 गते Gorakhkali Puja, Chanda Diwas
11 गते Baruthini Ekadashi, Loktantra Diwas
13 गते Matati Cha:hre, Rastriya Photo Patrakarita Diwas
14 गते Matatirtha Aaunshi, Aama ko Mukh Herne
15 गते Lalitpur Machhendranath Ratharohan
16 गते Parashuram Jayanti
17 गते Aakshyaya Tritiya, Shiva Parbati Bibah
18 गते World Workers Day, Lalitpur Rato Machhendranath Rath Yatra Aarambha
19 गते Adhyaguru Shankaracharya Jayanti
20 गते Rastriya Suchana Tatha Sanchar Prabidhi Diwas
22 गते Aastami Brat, Gorakhkali Puja
23 गते Sita Jayanti
24 गते Kirant Samaj Sudhar Diwas, Rastriya Patrakarita Diwas
25 गते Mohini Ekadashi
26 गते Rastriya Kanun Diwas
28 गते Narshinha Jayanti, Syangja Lasargha Alamdevi Puja
29 गते Gautam Buddha Jayanti, Swanya Punhi
